creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  A couple comments: Be careful not to let stray 
spaces into your Makefile, that can screw up the variable assignments 
and such.  Also, you can use ${PORTVERSION} in DISTNAME then substitute 
the _ for - in WRKSRC.  That simplifies things somewhat.  Finally, we 
don't allow names in MAINTAINER, to my knowledge.  Thanks for your work.
